name: Virginia v. LeBlanc
question: Was the determination that Virginia’s geriatric release program satisfied Graham v. Florida’s requirement that juvenile non-homicide offenders be afforded a meaningful opportunity to obtain release an unreasonable application of the Graham rule?
description: A case in which the Court held that the determination that Virginia’s geriatric release program satisfied Graham v. Florida’s requirement that juvenile non-homicide offenders be afforded a meaningful opportunity to obtain release was not an unreasonable application of the Graham rule.
